summary: Auto-lock tape measure for hardware retail and distributor programs, with easy-read steel blade, magnetic hook, shockproof ABS case, OEM logo, and custom packaging.
targetBuyers: Hardware importers, retail program buyers, tool distributors, wholesalers, and private-label tape measure brands
sellingPoints: Auto-lock mechanism with one-button rewind for easier daily use
Dual-side easy-read steel blade with magnetic hook option
OEM logo, shell color, barcode label and retail packaging support

specs.label: Material
specs.value: High-carbon steel tape, ABS shell, nylon lanyard, stainless steel hook, belt clip

specs.label: Customization
specs.value: Logo label or printing, Pantone shell color, magnetic hook option, blade specification, barcode, carton mark, and retail packaging

specs.label: Packaging
specs.value: OPP bag, color box, blister card, display box, export carton, buyer barcode, and carton mark

specs.label: MOQ
specs.value: Flexible MOQ, to be confirmed by order details

specs.label: Lead time
specs.value: Custom logo samples ready in about 3 days. Bulk lead time can be negotiated based on order quantity and packaging requirements.

title: Auto-Lock Tape Measure
quality: Auto-lock release and one-button rewind function test
Magnetic hook alignment, rivet strength, and blade readability check
ABS shell assembly, drop-resistance, belt clip, and lanyard inspection
Retail packaging, carton quantity, barcode, and carton mark review
